  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.AddValidationEntry(String, Object)
    Use Config.addValidationEntry(String, Object).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.AddValidationEntry(String, Object, String)
    Use Config.addValidationEntry(String, Object, String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.AddValidationEntry(String, Object, List<String>)
    Use Config.addValidationEntry(String, Object, List).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.AddValidationEntry(String, Vector2<T>)
    Use Config.addValidationEntry(String, Vector2).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.AddValidationEntry(String, Vector3<T>)
    Use Config.addValidationEntry(String, Vector3).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.Get(String)
    Use Config.get(String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.GetBool(String)
    Use Config.getBool(String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.GetComments(String)
    Use Config.getComments(String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.GetConfigurationSection(String)
    Use Config.getConfigurationSection(String).

    Use Config.getDouble(String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.GetDoubleList(String)
    Use Config.getDoubleList(String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.GetFile()
    Use Config.getFile().
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.getFloat(String)
    This method is outdated and will be removed in future versions. Use Config.getDouble(String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.GetFloat(String)
    Use Config.getFloat(String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.GetInt(String)
    Use Config.getInt(String).

    Use Config.getIntList(String).

    Use Config.getItemStack(String).

    Use Config.getList(String).

    Use Config.getMaterial(String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.GetPlugin()
    Use Config.getPlugin().
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.GetSection(String)
    Use Config.getSection(String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.GetString(String)
    Use Config.getString(String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.GetStringList(String)
    Use Config.getStringList(String).

    Use Config.getVector2(String).

    Use Config.getVector3(String).

    Use Config.hasKey(String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.Reload()
    Use Config.reload().
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.SaveConfig()
    Use Config.saveConfig().
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.Set(String, Object)
    Use Config.set(String, Object).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.SetBool(String, Boolean)
    Use Config.setBool(String, Boolean).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.SetComments(String, List<String>)
    Use Config.setComments(String, List).

    Use Config.setDouble(String, Double).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.SetDoubleList(String, List<Double>)
    Use Config.setDoubleList(String, List).

    Use Config.setInt(String, Integer).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.SetIntList(String, List<Integer>)
    Use Config.setIntList(String, List).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.SetItemStack(String, ItemStack)
    Use Config.setItemStack(String, ItemStack).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.SetList(String, List<?>)
    Use Config.setList(String, List).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.SetMaterial(String, Material)
    Use Config.setMaterial(String, Material).

    Use Config.setString(String, String).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.SetStringList(String, List<String>)
    Use Config.setStringList(String, List).

    Use Config.setVector2(String, Vector2).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.SetVector3(String, Vector3<T>)
    Use Config.setVector3(String, Vector3).
    valorless.valorlessutils.config.Config.Validate()
    Use Config.validate().

    names don't make for good identifiers.

    names don't make for good identifiers.
